payload.text:
👋 Welcome to Facebook Security Educator!

I'll help you keep your Facebook account safe with security tips, interactive quizzes, and daily lessons.

Before we begin — would you like me to track your quiz scores and learning streak?

This helps you see your progress over time. You can change this anytime.

name: accepting onboarding consent shows main menu

payload.text:
👋 Welcome to Facebook Security Educator!

I'll help you keep your Facebook account safe with security tips, interactive quizzes, and daily lessons.

Before we begin — would you like me to track your quiz scores and learning streak?

This helps you see your progress over time. You can change this anytime.

Great! I'll track your progress so you can see how much you're learning.

Tap a button below to get started.

name: declining onboarding shows main menu without tracking

payload.text:
No problem! You can still browse tips and take quizzes — I just won't save your scores.

Tap a button below to get started.
